spec.globalPrompt: Create one photorealistic cinematic scene image for a modern web novel. Keep the style consistent with the title, character, and background assets. Use realistic anatomy, realistic materials, grounded faces, and live-action-like lighting.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, readable letters, chapter labels, talk labels, section labels, subtitles, captions, logo, watermark, UI overlay, collage, split panel, multiple moments in one frame, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, malformed hands, direct eye contact with camera, looking at viewer, portrait-style posing for the viewer
spec.promptSuffix: In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.

episodes.title: 第1節　薄明の玄関
episodes.sourceSummary: 目覚ましが鳴る少し前に、サトーは自然に目を開けた。四月初旬の朝は、布団を出た瞬間だけまだ少し冷たい。その半端な温度が、かえって走る気を起こさせる。冬ほど億劫ではなく、初夏ほど重…
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-departure incident paired with scene-001-001-002-sera.
Keep the same dawn apartment corridor, doorway, and cool spring jogging outfit continuity in both images.
episodes.prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の河畔 / 第1話　走る支度. Scene focus: 第1節　薄明の玄関 / サトーパート. Summary: 目覚ましが鳴る少し前に、サトーは自然に目を開けた。四月初旬の朝は、布団を出た瞬間だけまだ少し冷たい。その半端な温度が、かえって走る気を起こさせる。冬ほど億劫ではなく、初夏ほど重… Key beats: 目覚ましが鳴る少し前に、サトーは自然に目を開けた。四月初旬の朝は、布団を出た瞬間だけまだ少し冷たい。その半端な温度が、かえって走る気を起こさせる。冬ほど億劫ではなく、初夏ほど重くもない。今朝くらいがいちばん素直に身体が前へ出る、と彼は思った。 洗面所で顔を洗い、キッチンで水をひと口飲んでから、クローゼットの前に立つ。吸汗の長袖トップスに、薄いネイビーのランニングジャケット、細身の黒いランニングパンツ。河川敷の風を考えれば、最初の一枚はあったほうがいい。靴ひもを結びながら、サトーはスポーツウォッチの画面を軽く叩いた。 窓を少しだけ開けると、外気の中に桜の青い匂いが混じっていた。白鷺川の土手は、今週がいちばんいい頃合いだろう。満開よりも、散りはじめのほうが走っていて楽しい。風が吹くたびに景色が少しずつ崩れていく感じが、朝の身体にはよく似合う。 玄関で肩を回し、ふくらはぎを軽く伸ばす。四十五歳になると、走る前の数分を雑にしたぶんだけ帰りの膝に返ってくる。準備を丁寧にするのは老けたからではなく、もうそれで十分に楽しいと知っているからだった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-departure incident paired with scene-001-001-002-sera. Keep the same dawn apartment corridor, doorway, and cool spring jogging outfit continuity in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Compose a calm early-morning apartment departure scene with Sato dominant near his doorway or hallway mirror, already dressed for a cool spring jog. The mood should be orderly and quietly pleased. If Sera appears at all, place her far away near a stairwell shadow or service corner, clearly separate from Sato.
episodes.negativePrompt: Do not place Sera beside Sato as a companion. Do not make the apartment scene feel like open action.

episodes.title: 第2節　廊下の死角
episodes.sourceSummary: そのころ、共用廊下の外れでは、宅配業者を装った男が非常階段脇へ折りたたみ式の搬送カートを寄せ、防災盤の陰に薄い発煙器具を差し込もうとしていた。狙いは大げさな火災ではない。短い警…
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same apartment-departure incident as scene-001-001-001-sato.
Keep the same apartment corridor, parcel area, and dawn light as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background figure leaving home and must not look toward the incident.

In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Keep Sato smaller in the background just heading out for his run and unaware.

episodes.title: 第1節　朝霧橋の風
episodes.sourceSummary: 住宅街を抜け、白鷺川の河川敷へ下りた瞬間、桜吹雪が視界の高さで横へ流れた。遊歩道の上を薄桃色の筋が走り、川面はまだ朝の白さを残している。こういう景色は見に行くものというより、走…
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the bridge incident paired with scene-001-002-002-sera.
Keep the same cherry-blossom riverside approach, urban bridge, and cool spring wind mood in both images.

Scene focus: 第1節　朝霧橋の風 / サトーパート. Summary: 住宅街を抜け、白鷺川の河川敷へ下りた瞬間、桜吹雪が視界の高さで横へ流れた。遊歩道の上を薄桃色の筋が走り、川面はまだ朝の白さを残している。こういう景色は見に行くものというより、走… Key beats: 住宅街を抜け、白鷺川の河川敷へ下りた瞬間、桜吹雪が視界の高さで横へ流れた。遊歩道の上を薄桃色の筋が走り、川面はまだ朝の白さを残している。こういう景色は見に行くものというより、走っているうちに向こうから来てくれるくらいがちょうどいい。サトーは口元を少しゆるめ、そのまま自然に歩幅を整えた。 最初の数百メートルは抑えめに入る。ジャケットの前をわずかに開け、呼吸が浅くなりすぎない速度を探る。左に川、右に草の斜面、その向こうにマンションの列。都内の風景なのに、走っているあいだだけは妙に余白がある。白い花びらがシューズの先へまとわりついては離れ、また風にさらわれていった。 そのまま朝霧橋へ上がるスロープへ入ると、風は河川敷より一段だけ冷たくなった。けれど不快ではない。火照りはじめた頬へ当たると、むしろちょうどいい。欄干の向こうには、朝日を受けた川が長く伸びていた。 橋の踊り場の先で、自転車がわずかによろけ、作業ベスト姿の男が慌てて床へしゃがみこむのが見えた。橋の上は横風が抜けるし、朝露も残りやすいのだろう。見晴らしがいい場所ほど、足元の管理は面倒そうだとサトーは勝手に納得した。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Show Sato dominant running from a cherry-blossom-lined embankment onto an urban river bridge, with visible spring petals, morning light, and a strong sense of fresh air. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near stairs, bridge shadows, or far along the path, never companion-like.
episodes.negativePrompt: Do not make Sato look alarmed or combat-ready. Do not introduce shrine, temple, engawa, tatami, or old religious architecture.

episodes.title: 第2節　橋脚の陰
episodes.sourceSummary: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は自転車乗りを装い、ふらついた標的を階段側へ寄せる役。下の橋脚脇には、落ちた人間をす…
continuityNotes: This is the Sera-side second section of the same bridge incident as scene-001-002-001-sato.
Keep the same bridge, same stair landing, and same blossom-caught morning wind as the paired image.
Sato must remain an unaware background runner further along the bridge and must face his route rather than the incident.

Summary: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は自転車乗りを装い、ふらついた標的を階段側へ寄せる役。下の橋脚脇には、落ちた人間をす… Key beats: 橋の踊り場では、清掃作業員を装った男が滑り止めシートの端へ透明な被膜剤を塗っていた。もう一人は自転車乗りを装い、ふらついた標的を階段側へ寄せる役。下の橋脚脇には、落ちた人間をすぐ抱え込める位置に拘束班がいる。橋は風があるぶん、ほんの一歩の乱れがよく効く。だから選んだのだろうが、選び方としてはあまりに露骨だった。 セラは欄干の影へ体を沿わせたまま、朝光で不自然に照る被膜の筋を見た。メイド風ジョギングウェアは見た目こそ柔らかいが、走るための裁断はよくできている。裾も袖も動きを邪魔しない。彼女は踊り場へ続く人波の死角へ入り、距離だけを詰めた。 「春風のせいにしたいなら、もう少し丁寧にやってください」 まず被膜剤のノズルへ踵を入れ、中身を床へ落とさず手元だけを狂わせる。振り返った男の手首へ白手袋が絡み、そのまま欄干支柱へ押しつけられた。自転車役がタイミングを合わせて車体を振った瞬間には、セラの膝が前輪の芯を外し、男ごと手すり側へ流す。階段下から出てきた拘束役には、踊り場の死角で肘を一撃。息を失った三人は、清掃用具と車体の陰に静かに折りたたまれた。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sera-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a tense bridge-landing action image with Sera dominant, stopping a slip-and-grab ambush involving a fake cyclist, a saboteur near anti-slip flooring, or abductors waiting by bridge stairs. Keep Sato smaller in the background, simply running onward and unaware.

episodes.title: 第1節　花びらのトンネル
episodes.chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
episodes.talkTitle: 第1話　朝のリズムが整う
episodes.sourceSummary: 橋を越えてしばらくすると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だろう。…
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the blossom-tunnel incident paired with scene-002-001-002-sera.
Keep the same curved riverside path, blossom canopy, and drifting petals in both images.
episodes.prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第1話　朝のリズムが整う. Scene focus: 第1節　花びらのトンネル / サトーパート. Summary: 橋を越えてしばらくすると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だろう。… Key beats: 橋を越えてしばらくすると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だろう。サトーはジャケットのファスナーをもう少しだけ下げ、白鷺川沿いの緩いカーブへ身体を乗せた。 そこから先の遊歩道は、桜の枝が頭上で重なり、花びらのトンネルみたいになっている。風が通るたび、薄い桃色の膜が前から後ろへ流れた。地面に積もった花びらはきれいだが、走る側からすると少しだけ滑りやすい。その曖昧な手触りまで含めて、春の河川敷は悪くない。 カーブの先で、空のベビーカーを押した若い母親らしい人影が一度だけよろめいた。前輪が花びらの吹きだまりへ取られたのか、すぐ脇にいた男性が慌てて持ち直している。散り際の朝は小さな車輪ほど扱いづらいのだろう。サトーは自分の歩幅だけを少し丁寧に整えた。 誰も他人の朝へ踏み込みすぎない。その距離感が河川敷にはある。サトーはその気楽さごと、花びらの下を抜けていく。走ること自体が楽しいと感じる朝は、それだけで少し得をしたような気分になった。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the blossom-tunnel incident paired with scene-002-001-002-sera. Keep the same curved riverside path, blossom canopy, and drifting petals in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Show Sato dominant running through a curved riverside tunnel of cherry blossoms, with petals sweeping across the path and a light, enjoyable cruising rhythm. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato near the outer edge of the path or under deeper shadows, never companion-like.
episodes.negativePrompt: Do not stage Sato and Sera as a jogging pair.

episodes.title: 第2節　並木の外側
episodes.chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
episodes.talkTitle: 第1話　朝のリズムが整う
episodes.sourceSummary: そのカーブの外側では、若い夫婦を装った男女が空のベビーカーを使って遊歩道の幅を絞っていた。片方が前輪をわざと流し、もう片方が助け起こすふりで標的の進路を塞ぐ。その足元には低い位…

episodes.title: 第1節　水神社の石段
episodes.chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
episodes.talkTitle: 第2話　折り返して戻る
episodes.sourceSummary: 白鷺川沿いをしばらく進んだ先で、遊歩道は小さな水神社の脇へ出る。大きな名所というほどではないが、石段と社の影がちょうどよく、折り返しの区切りには向いていた。サトーはそこでいった…
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-side first section of the shrine-turnaround incident paired with scene-002-002-002-sera.

episodes.title: 第2節　社裏の連れ去り線
episodes.chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
episodes.talkTitle: 第2話　折り返して戻る
episodes.sourceSummary: 水神社の裏手では、管理人補佐を装った男が細長い拘束ケースを抱え、路地側では軽バンの後部扉がいつでも閉まる角度で待機していた。石段で歩幅を落とした標的を社の影へ誘い、口を塞いで荷…

episodes.sourceSummary: 河川敷を離れて街区へ戻るころには、脚の重さも心地よいほうへ落ち着いていた。川沿い近くのベーカリーは、朝のジョギング帰りに寄るにはちょうどいい位置にある。ガラス戸を開けると焼きた…
